description: Product Description Extremely absorbent and quick drying Leak-proof backing to keep your house clean No nasty smells in the house as our pads trap the odour Non toxic MESS FREE PUPPY TRAINING SOLUTION Designed to make your life easier and give your puppy the comfort they deserve. Toilet training your puppy can be very hard and stressful both on the owner as much as the pet is extremely important to get this right as quickly as possible. Our training mats have been made to help you out. Perfect to use : Car Home Outdoor Crates Dog bed 5 Protective layers Made of 5 layers of material making sure no mess is left on your floor. Training pads can easily be moved outside in onrder to advance your puppy toiler training. No more muddy paws 5 Layer material eliminates and traps all the dirt form entering your house , if you have a pet that enjoys running round in the garden this would be the perfect solution to put by your door to prevent any dirt of debris entering on dogs paws.
